center.name: 玛格丽特河 (西澳)
center.summary: 玛格丽特河 (西澳)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红翅细尾鹩莺，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|Eucalyptus diversicolor|Karri Forest near Pemberton, the preferred habitat The red-winged fairywren occurs in the wetter, southwest corner of Western Australia, from Moore River north of Perth south through to the Margaret River region and east to Albany. It is common in parts of its range,{{cite book|title=Birds of Australia|last1=Flegg |first1=J
